final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: needs a "3D animation, Pixar style" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Pixar character model sheets, 3D animation expression studies, contemporary stylized character design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3x3 grid layout with 9 panels total — top-left, top-center, top-right, middle-left, middle-center, middle-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, bottom-right
Subject: must include Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) as the central character across all 9 panels with consistent base features: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses; must include all 9 expression/action/outfit variations:
  Panel 1 (top-left): winking expression, adjusting glasses action, green sweater
  Panel 2 (top-center): smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses action, red leather jacket
  Panel 3 (top-right): thinking expression, finger on chin action, yellow hoodie
  Panel 4 (middle-left): big smile expression, arms resting on edge action, black and white striped shirt
  Panel 5 (middle-center): smiling expression, thumbs up action, orange button-up shirt
  Panel 6 (middle-right): neutral expression, drinking boba tea action, blue sweater
  Panel 7 (bottom-left): happy expression, waving action, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Panel 8 (bottom-center): laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed action, pink cardigan
  Panel 9 (bottom-right): silly expression, poking cheeks action, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include a consistent framing concept across all panels — peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, cheerful character study atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction to accommodate the 9 different outfit colors — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a 3D-rendered surface treatment — exact material properties are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve Zhao Ling'er's recognizable character identity from the Chinese Paladin IP; must maintain consistent character base (hair, glasses) across all 9 panels; torn paper framing must be consistent across all panels
Avoid:
